responsibilities: Analyze commercial insurance policies, coverages, exclusions, and pricing structures to identify the most suitable and cost-effective solutions for clients.

Manage policy renewals, endorsements, and insurance documentation while ensuring accuracy and compliance.
Review contracts, policy forms, and supporting documentation to identify risks, limitations, and potential coverage gaps.
Maintain client records within Applied Epic and EZLynx, ensuring data integrity and operational efficiency.
Coordinate directly with clients to explain coverage options, resolve issues, and provide ongoing account support.
Supported daily insurance operations, including policy processing, renewals, endorsements, and document management.
Assisted in preparing quotations and coordinating communications among clients, brokers, carriers, and internal teams.
Maintained accurate policy and client records within agency management systems.
Provided professional English-Spanish translation and interpretation services across healthcare, education, and business environments.
Facilitated communication between clients, patients, professionals, and organizations while ensuring linguistic accuracy and cultural appropriateness.
Worked with healthcare, educational, and business-related content requiring confidentiality, accuracy, and strong attention to detail.
